PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

  ?competition wdt:P585 ?date .
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
  FILTER(?year >= 1988 && ?year <= 2013)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1

  ?competition wdt:P585 ?date.
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
  FILTER (?year >= 1988 && ?year <= 2013)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
